# CWE-551: path canonicalized before role check.
lang: go
file: CWE-551-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func AdminGate(c *gin.Context) {
	raw := c.Request.URL.Path
	clean, err := url.PathUnescape(raw)
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	clean = strings.ReplaceAll(clean, "//", "/")
	if !strings.HasPrefix(clean, "/admin") {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	c.Request.URL.Path = clean
	c.Next()
}
